scripts.build:api: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace=packages/api
scripts.build:mcp: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace=packages/mcp
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace=packages/api && npm run build --workspace=packages/mcp && npm run build --workspace=packages/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/mcp
